full_text:
Empress Cao Jie 曹節皇后
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Empress Cao Jie (曹節皇后)was born in Pei. Emperor Xian’s empress after death of Empress Fu, opposed Cao Pi becoming Emperor. Empress Cao Jie was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Empress Cao Jie lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
